what: Add quant-kernel tl.assume extent and unit-stride facts on top of the split-K=7 reduce4x32 waves=1 branch for the 16x2112x7168 path
why: v310 is the current best benchmarked branch at 8.6238us, and the new assumptions only tighten already-true layout facts (positive extents, contiguous K axis, contiguous packed-fp4 axis) without changing the launch geometry
override: Closest prior tl.assume attempt was on the 8x32/waves2 branch; this one targets the separate 4x32/waves1 benchmark winner

what: Restore the quant-kernel tl.multiple_of stride-alignment hints on top of the split-K=7 reduce4x32 waves=1 plus tl.assume branch
why: The just-queued v313 candidate accidentally dropped the compile-time alignment facts present in v310; adding them back makes the branch a strict superset of the strongest 4x32 benchmark winner plus the new assumptions
override: Distinct from v253 because this targets the large-K split-K=7 reduce4x32 waves=1 branch rather than the old baseline; distinct from v313 because it restores the missing alignment hints

what: Use waves_per_eu=0 on the split-K=7 reduce4x32 branch while keeping the restored tl.assume and tl.multiple_of quant hints
why: v310 showed that lowering the large-K occupancy hint from 2 to 1 materially helped the 4x32 branch; the remaining untested point in that same family is letting the compiler choose residency entirely while preserving the better reduction tile and full hint set
override: This is distinct from v311/v309 because those were 8x32 variants, and distinct from v314 because it changes only the large-K waves hint on the stronger 4x32 branch

what: Use waves_per_eu=2 on the split-K=7 reduce4x32 branch while keeping the restored tl.assume and tl.multiple_of quant hints
why: With v314 and v315 covering waves=1 and waves=0 on the same 4x32 full-hints branch, the remaining occupancy point is waves=2. This closes the large-K waves sweep on the strongest reduction geometry with a controlled hint set
override: Distinct from v306 because that earlier 4x32 branch lacked the newer tl.assume facts and did not isolate the full hint bundle on the same code path

what: Apply the full quant-kernel hint bundle to the split-K=7 reduce16x32 branch and use the large-K waves_per_eu=1 setting
why: The controlled 4x32 sweep now has correctness coverage, but only the 8x32 hinted branch has leaderboard evidence and it regressed. The 16x32 reduction-width control is the closest unexplored neighbor that changes less of the reduction geometry than 4x32 while still avoiding the older default 16x64 width
override: Distinct from v294/v301 because those older 16x32 variants lacked the restored quant hints and did not test the lower waves_per_eu=1 setting on the repaired branch

what: Use waves_per_eu=0 on the split-K=7 reduce16x32 branch while keeping the full quant-kernel hint bundle
why: The new 16x32 full-hints branch is now queued at waves=1. To compare reduction geometry fairly against the successful 4x32 family, the next controlled point is compiler-selected residency on the same 16x32 code path
override: Distinct from v317 because it changes only the large-K waves hint on the new 16x32 full-hints branch

what: Remove the tl.assume extent/unit-stride facts from the split-K=7 reduce16x32 waves=1 branch while keeping the tl.multiple_of alignment hints
why: v314 showed that adding tl.assume on top of the 4x32 waves=1 branch regressed BM from the earlier 8.62us v310 baseline to 8.76us, so the next useful experiment is to evaluate the new 16x32 geometry without carrying the now-suspect tl.assume bundle
override: Distinct from v317 because it removes the newly identified regression source; distinct from v294 because it preserves the restored tl.multiple_of and contiguous-lane hints on the repaired branch

what: Remove the tl.assume bundle from the split-K=7 reduce4x32 waves=0 branch while keeping the tl.multiple_of and max_contiguous hints
why: v314 established that tl.assume regresses the 4x32 waves=1 branch. Since v315 queued the same suspect hint bundle at waves=0, the clean follow-up is to test the compiler-selected-waves 4x32 branch without tl.assume contamination
override: Distinct from v315 because it removes the regression source while keeping the same reduction geometry and waves setting
